characters.name: Surfer's Paradise Employees
characters.description: This is complete list of the employees (former and current) of Surfer's Paradise Ridgemount Resort.

characters.name: Surfer's Paradise Employees
characters.description: This is complete list of the employees (former and current) of Surfer's Paradise Ridgemount Resort.

characters.name: Amber Green
characters.description: Amber Greenis a girl whomFintouredwith for theJunior Surfing Competition, but the two clearly don't get along. After Reef sees Fin flirting with another guy, he starts dating Amber to make her jealous. Fin tries warning Reef about her, but he brushes off her concerns, dismissing it as her being jealous. Amber likes collecting snake skins and made a shirt for Reef for their 'wedding day', which starts to creep Reef out. She sneaks into his room while he's sleeping and paints a picture of him, which she thinks 'captures his soul'. She sneaks in again and cuts off a bunch of his hair to put in a locket. When Reef tries to break up with her, she gets distracted by a fly and brutally murders it. He finally goes to Fin for advice, getting down on his knees. Amber sees this and says he "better not be proposing to her".

characters.name: Andrew Baumer
characters.description: "Welcome to Surfer's Paradise! I'm Andrew Baumer, daytime manager." —Baumer, upon meetingBroseph,Emma,ReefandFinin "Welcome to Paradise, Dudes!" Bummer uses astrikesystem in which if an employee does something wrong they get a strike. If the employee gets three, then they get fired. Examples of getting strikes are causing messes, slacking off at work, getting less than 8/10 on a evaluation, being late, and even eating some left over food from guest plates. So far through the series though, no one has gotten all three strikes. Johnny though got a permanent strike that would never be removed from the strike list in "Grand Theft Whale Bus". When Bummer is excited he mightcancel one or more strikesfrom an employee's record. Bummer seems to have a huge dislike directed toward bothReefandLo(the former especially). Reef and Bummer just don't see eye to eye on a lot of things, like working and time off and occasionally fight about the issue. After Lo throws a party at the hotel her father makes her get a job at the hotel. Bummer, along withKellyand (later on)Rosie, threaten to tell her dad if she screws up since they technically can't fire her, due to the fact that Lo's family owns the resort (as well as the fact that Lo's being forced to work at hotel rather than willingly working there). Bummer also frequently shows little to no regard for the safety or well-being of the groms in general, as evidenced by his: By acting as a buffer between Mr. Ridgemount and the staff working under him, he's most likely deliberately keeping his boss in the dark about the conditions that the groms are forced to work under by Bummer--especially so since Lo joined the staff in "Board and Confused," as it is likely he believes it would cost him his job as the day manager if Mr. Ridgemount found out about what his daughter was being subjected to.

characters.name: Anglerfish
characters.description: The Anglerfishis one of the fish in theLobbyquarium. It has a light on its head and has large teeth.

characters.description: Armpitisthe Kahuna's pet skunk who lives atSunset Beach.

characters.name: Barry
characters.description: Barryis a Goth Rock musician and a member of the bandThe Creepy Cretins.

characters.name: Bear
characters.description: TheBearis an unknown bear who lives inthe Forestnear theStaff Housing. His role is minor, but he often tries to eat and devour the groms when they go on the trail.

characters.name: Bear
characters.description: TheBearis an unknown bear who lives inthe Forestnear theStaff Housing. His role is minor, but he often tries to eat and devour the groms when they go on the trail.

characters.name: Betty Sandstone
characters.description: Betty Sandstoneis a female surfer who works withTuna McGillis. She also entered theStaff Tandem Surfing Contestpitting her and Tuna againstReefandBroseph(who replaced the injuredFinas Reef's partner in the event).

characters.name: Betty Sandstone
characters.description: Betty Sandstoneis a female surfer who works withTuna McGillis. She also entered theStaff Tandem Surfing Contestpitting her and Tuna againstReefandBroseph(who replaced the injuredFinas Reef's partner in the event).

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: BillyisJimmy's brother, who is taller and larger in size than Jimmy is. In "The Reefinator",Lomisguidedly invites the hulking Billy to a pre-planned fight betweenReefand Jimmy. During the fight, Billy and Jimmy gang up on Reef and intimidate him to the point where he attempts to no avail to beg his opponents for mercy and escape. The fight ends when Billy and Jimmy attempt to pounce on Reef, but collide into each other instead.

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: BillyisJimmy's brother, who is taller and larger in size than Jimmy is. During the fight, Billy and Jimmy gang up on Reef and intimidate him to the point where he attempts to no avail to beg his opponents for mercy and escape. The fight ends when Billy and Jimmy attempt to pounce on Reef, but collide into each other instead.

characters.name: Blair
characters.description: Blairis a female surfing student who is a tourist atSurfer's Paradise Ridgemount Resort. She had a relationship withReef, but afteran incidentat theBig Wave Theatre, where a jealousFinset her and Reef up on a date to seeBreak Point, the movie that Reef was taking lines from to use on her, she dumped him and then dumped cheese-covered nachos over his head. Blair starts out as a happy girl who's easily fooled, but she can be very nasty and unforgiving. After dumping Reef, she later turns nasty when she threatens to have Fin,LoandEmmafired from the hotel when she suspects that the dresses they are wearing are hers (which the girls avoid when they beat Blair back to the hotel and get the dresses back inher room's closet and get out of her room through the balcony just seconds before she arrives).

characters.name: Bluejay
characters.description: Bluejaysare a type of bird who live inThe Forestat Surfer's Paradise. One was stuffed byEmmain a taxidermy job when she was doing chores forthe Kahuna.

characters.name: Bluejay
characters.description: Bluejaysare a type of bird who live inThe Forestat Surfer's Paradise. One was stuffed byEmmain a taxidermy job when she was doing chores forthe Kahuna.

characters.name: Brad
characters.description: Bradis a friend ofReefandMoe. He apparently got the new job as manager atthe Dairy Princess. He also got rid of the uniforms, let the staff pick their own hours, and threw a huge party for the staff (including Moe). Reef was apparently ticked off by this when Moe told him about it over the phone.

characters.name: Broseph
characters.description: Brosephis one of the main six characters inStoked. He is the older brother ofGrommet, the best friend of George, Lo and Ty’s bratty younger brother. He is one of the locals in the show and already knewJohnny,Lance, andRipperbefore the show started. He is the new bellhop at theresort. He might not be the best worker, but he is a killer surfer. He used to work for hismomat hersurf shoponSunset Beach, but he wanted to change his scenery around so decided to get a job at the resort. He bunks with Reef and Johnny. He speaks with a Caribbean accent, which indicates he was originally from that part of the world before coming to Canada. Broseph is a sixteen-year-old boy with a slim and muscular build, though he could be seen having a belly once in a while after eating a lot of food. His afro blonde hair which holds a lot of his belongings or collects random things, brown eyes, and shown to be relaxed almost all the time. Broseph is laid-back, chill, and carefree, comparatively to an ideal surfer. Broseph is shown to get along with mostly everyone, as he is already friendly with Johnny, Lance, and Ripper. He also is quick to become friends with the new locals - Emma, Reef, and Fin. Although initially seeming like a loner, Broseph merely enjoys the beach and surfing more than anyone else except possibly the Kahuna. He doesn't surf for competitiveness, sponsors, and money, but rather surfs for pure enjoyment and is an ideal "soul surfer".  He also is disappointed when he is sponsored by Fin and Reef's shenanigans and considers, but decides he isn't interested in the limelight. Broseph is laid-back, chill, and carefree, comparatively to an ideal surfer. Broseph is shown to get along with mostly everyone, as he is already friendly with Johnny, Lance, and Ripper. He also is quick to become friends with the new locals - Emma, Reef, and Fin. Although initially seeming like a loner, Broseph merely enjoys the beach and surfing more than anyone else except possibly the Kahuna. He doesn't surf for competitiveness, sponsors, and money, but rather surfs for pure enjoyment and is an ideal "soul surfer".  He also is disappointed when he is sponsored by Fin and Reef's shenanigans and considers, but decides he isn't interested in the limelight. Broseph isn't necessarily terrible at his job, he but can be lazy and like Reef will try to avoid doing his work to go surfing. According to the groms, Broseph is the best prankster on the island, competing with Ripper, Lance, and Reef.

characters.name: Broseph's dream girl
characters.description: Broseph's dream girlis a minor character onStoked. Introduced in the show's second episode "Another Grom Bites the Dust", she is a lovely young woman wearing a tan-colored bikini and aniPodon her left arm, whoBrosephtakes an instant liking to when he first spots her walking by him in thehotellobby. Broseph never actually meets her or speaks to her, but he has had her on his mind since then.

Broseph never actually meets her or speaks to her, but he has had her on his mind since then.

characters.name: Broseph's Mom
characters.description: Broseph's momis a local woman who lives atSunset Beach. She owns a store called theSurf Shack.

characters.name: Broseph's Uncle
characters.description: In "Charging into the Night", Broseph mentions having an uncle who works as an electrician and that his uncle taught him various parts of his work, such as how to fix something like a circuit breaker. In "Slumber Party Animals", Broseph mentions to Reef that an uncle of his once developed "skin scare" after accidentally seeing Broseph's grandfather taking a shower. It's unknown if this is the same uncle who works as an electrician, or an entirely different uncle.

characters.name: Buster
characters.description: Busteris the shark in theLobbyquariumatSurfer's Paradise Ridgemount Resort. He is good friends withSonny. He has a small brain, as mentioned by his friend, and isn't really that smart, unlike other sharks. He also is the size of aGreat White, and possibly is one, but according toBummer, he is "genetically engineered for non-violent lobbyquarium living". This is revealed to be a lie, as he tried to eatReef,JohnnyandBroseph, as well as Sonny and a small boy namedCarlos, on several occasions.

characters.name: Captain Clam
characters.description: Captain ClamisCaptain Ron's Hotel's version ofWipeout. He is turquoise, with yellow eyes, black pupils and he looks a clam trying to smile.

characters.name: Captain Clam
characters.description: Captain ClamisCaptain Ron's Hotel's version ofWipeout. He is turquoise, with yellow eyes, black pupils and he looks a clam trying to smile.

characters.name: Captain Ron
characters.description: Captain Ronis the owner and head of a rivalhotelcompany. He is rude. He always used to lose toMr. Ridgemountup until "Boards of Glory", where he finally won a competition against theRidgemount Resortsowner. He has a dry sense of humor, making a joke aboutReefandBrosephand he is the only one laughing. He is rude. He always used to lose toMr. Ridgemountup until "Boards of Glory", where he finally won a competition against theRidgemount Resortsowner. He has a dry sense of humor, making a joke aboutReefandBrosephand he is the only one laughing.

characters.name: Carl
characters.description: Carl "talks" to Broseph. Carlis a piece ofambergristhatBrosephfound while surfing. It has markings that look like a face, causing Broseph to form a connection with Carl and treat it like a person.Emmafinds out it is worth a lot of money and shaves pieces off Carl to sell and buy herself a wetsuit to compete inGromfestso people don't call her "No-Bikini Betty" (a nickname given to her when she lost her bikini and was left naked after a wipeout while surfing).Bummer, frustrated at not being able to fireReef, kicks it back into the ocean just as Broseph decides to sell it and buy Emma a wetsuit.

characters.name: Carl

It has markings that look like a face, causing Broseph to form a connection with Carl and treat it like a person.Emmafinds out it is worth a lot of money and shaves pieces off Carl to sell and buy herself a wetsuit to compete inGromfestso people don't call her "No-Bikini Betty" (a nickname given to her when she lost her bikini and was left naked after a wipeout while surfing).Bummer, frustrated at not being able to fireReef, kicks it back into the ocean just as Broseph decides to sell it and buy Emma a wetsuit.

characters.name: Carlos
characters.description: Carlosis a young guest atSurfer's Paradise, who was stranded at the hotel along with the groms and some of the senior staff during Tropical Storm Bingo. He had been mistakenly left behind by his parents when he went looking for his pet lizard, Stu, whenEmmafound him at the hotel beach and he asked her to help him find his pet. He also talked about being afraid of a "big wave monster", which Emma at first assumed was the storm but which she later discovered was really theLobbyquarium's resident shark,Buster, who escaped when the Lobbyquarium was damaged during the storm whenthe Whalebuslanded in it after being thrown through the hotel tower by the powerful storm winds. Carlos eventually found Stu when the lizard was seen floating on a leaf on the water in the flooded lobby, and Stu ended up saving the day forBrosephwhen Buster, who was about to attack and devour Broseph while he was in the water, saw Stu and swam away in fear (because Buster had earlier toldSonnythat he was afraid of anything green, which Stu is).

characters.name: Carlos

Carlos eventually found Stu when the lizard was seen floating on a leaf on the water in the flooded lobby, and Stu ended up saving the day forBrosephwhen Buster, who was about to attack and devour Broseph while he was in the water, saw Stu and swam away in fear (because Buster had earlier toldSonnythat he was afraid of anything green, which Stu is).

characters.name: Caroline
characters.description: Carolineis a tourist who appeared inBrowatchwith her dog, Poker. The groms note her stupidity and try to rip her off by claiming that thestaff houseis the hotel and hiding the actual one from her in order to make some more money. They soon become annoyed when she starts making ridiculous requests such as a toe jam removal fromReef. Later in the episode, the groms add extra charges for her annoyance, ridiculous requests, toe jam removal, and for Poker defecating onJohnny's shoes. However, when they walk into the room to charge her, they find a note, which states that she found the actual hotel and thus left without paying.

characters.name: Charlie
characters.description: Charliewas a brown fish who lived in theLobbyquariumbetween thefirst episodeand "Groms Gone Wild". The only fish who didn't survive whenBrosephcrashed thegolf cartinto the Lobbyquarium and cracked the glass, causing the water to flood out onto the lobby floor and taking all the fish with it, including Charlie. The groms then performed a funeral where Broseph gave a eulogy beforeFininterrupted and flushed Charlie down the toilet. Reef: Do do doo doo do do...Broseph: I knew fishy since he was... a fishy. When I needed a helping fin, He was always there. He was a good fish, a gentle fish, a...Fin: I didn't know him.

characters.description: Charliewas a brown fish who lived in theLobbyquariumbetween thefirst episodeand "Groms Gone Wild". The only fish who didn't survive whenBrosephcrashed thegolf cartinto the Lobbyquarium and cracked the glass, causing the water to flood out onto the lobby floor and taking all the fish with it, including Charlie. The groms then performed a funeral where Broseph gave a eulogy beforeFininterrupted and flushed Charlie down the toilet. Reef: Do do doo doo do do...Broseph: I knew fishy since he was... a fishy. When I needed a helping fin, He was always there. He was a good fish, a gentle fish, a...Fin: I didn't know him.

characters.name: Chef
characters.description: Chefis the French chef at thePirate Shiprestaurant. He is critical about his food and will not like it if someone dislikes his food. In "Penthouse of Horror", he was one of the three people to be attacked byFluffythe zombie fishstick, which he helped kill and serve to Mr. Marvin. WhenMr. RidgemounthasEmmatell him that each muffin should have equal blueberries he yelled, said it was nonsense and then threw a muffin at Emma as he chased her out of the restaurant kitchen.

characters.name: Chelsea
characters.description: Chelseais aSurfer's Paradiseemployee who is (or was) on psych leave and is a former child sitter, prior toLobeing given her old job.

characters.name: Chester Grizzle
characters.description: Mr. Chester Grizzleis an old man who learned surfing fromReef. A grouchy old man who looks and acts like a stereotypical "older geezer," but he's displayed a softer side many times. He's known to give people nicknames, whether they like it or not---for example, Chester sometimes callsReef"Cream Puff."
